title: The Next 24 Hours
overview: The Next 24 Tells a story about the harsh truth of human trafficking, right here in the United States. The Next 24 takes a deep look at how young girls are targeted and lured into this modern-day slavery, and how they are bought and sold for profit around the globe. "It only takes 24 hours for a young girl to be lost for good, in the world of Human Trafficking".
